name: TestIso11783IL_PDDSetLogTrigger
title: TestIso11783IL_PDDSetLogTrigger
syntax: long TestIso11783IL_PDDSetLogTrigger( dbNode node, dword command, ulong ddi, ulong elNum, ulong value );
description: A measurement command can be executed with this function. It can be used in the callback function Iso11783IL_PDDOnDefaultLogRequest to activate the default logging.
Dependent on the used parameter type the appropriate bus context in a multibus environment has only to be set before the function is called if the corresponding database object will be ambiguous.
Further information on site MultiBus Environment.

parameters.name: node
parameters.description: Simulation node to apply the function.
